mapper.insert: insert into t_audit_event(event_name, dt_insert, dt_received, request_channel, request_sys, dt_responsed, status, dt_update, user_id, version, client_ip, description, display_name, user_name, operation) values (#{event_name}, now(), #{dt_received}, 'infrared', 'From infrared', #{dt_responsed}, #{status}, now(), #{user_id}, 1, #{client_ip}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{display_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{user_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operation})
